text: I have 9 merged PRs that close a Linear issue. Let me create issues for all of them in acme/web.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def closers (filter #(not (nil? (:closes_linear %))) (github__list_pull_requests {:state "merged"})))
(def web-closers (filter #(= "acme/web" (:repo %)) closers))
(def other-closers (filter #(not= "acme/web" (:repo %)) closers))
(println "web: " (count web-closers) " others: " (count other-closers))
(map :title closers)"}
